此操作完成後無法復原，請再次確認。: This action cannot be undone. Please confirm again.
此篇動態貼文與實體照片將從伺服器永久徹底刪除，本操作無法救回！: This post and its photos will be permanently deleted from the server. This action cannot be undone.
操作逾時，請檢查網路後再試一次。: Request timed out. Check your connection and try again.
操作未完成，請重新整理後再試一次。: The operation was not completed. Refresh and try again.
操作未完成，請稍後再試。: The operation was not completed. Try again later.
無法與伺服器取得連線: Unable to connect to the server
僅支援 JPG、PNG 或 WebP 圖片格式。: Only JPG, PNG, or WebP images are supported.
單張圖片不可超過 8MB。: Each image must be under 8 MB.
請輸入您的帳號與密碼進行登入: Enter your account and password to log in.
伺服器尚未完成連線，請稍後再登入。: The server connection is not ready yet. Please log in later.
登入驗證逾時，請檢查網路或稍後重試。: Login verification timed out. Check your network or try again later.
該帳號未完成帳號申請。: This account has not completed its application.
帳號狀態尚未啟用，請等待審核。: This account is not active yet. Please wait for review.
臨時登入憑證已過期，請重新提出忘記密碼申請。: The temporary login code has expired. Please submit a new password reset request.
忘記密碼？取得 10 分鐘臨時登入憑證: Forgot password? Get a 10-minute temporary login code
若使用臨時登入憑證，登入後系統會要求您立即設定新密碼。: If you use a temporary login code, you will be required to set a new password after login.
您目前使用的是管理員設定的臨時登入憑證。請先設定自己的新密碼後再進入平台。: You are currently using a temporary login code set by an administrator. Please set your own new password before entering the platform.
密碼需至少 8 碼，包含 1 個英文大寫字母與 1 個特殊符號。: Password must be at least 8 characters and include one uppercase letter and one special character.
請輸入並確認新密碼。: Please enter and confirm your new password.
兩次輸入的新密碼不一致。: The two new passwords do not match.
新密碼不可與臨時登入憑證相同。: The new password cannot be the same as the temporary login code.
若要修改密碼，請輸入目前密碼與新密碼。: To change your password, enter your current password and a new password.
請完整填寫目前密碼、新密碼與確認密碼。: Please fill in current password, new password, and confirmation password.
新密碼不可與目前密碼相同。: The new password cannot be the same as the current password.
密碼已修改，已寄出安全提醒。: Password updated. A security notice has been sent.
請填寫以下註冊資料。我們將人工審查，以保障俱樂部會員隱私與安全。: Please complete the registration information below. We manually review applications to protect member privacy and safety.
上傳個人真實頭像照片: Upload a real personal avatar photo
請上傳本人真實正面清晰之照片，嚴禁風景、卡通 or 不合規相片。: Upload a clear front-facing real photo of yourself. Landscapes, cartoons, or non-compliant images are not allowed.
審核結果、黃金會員、檢舉處理與頭像更換結果將寄送到此信箱。: Review results, Gold Spec notices, report handling, and avatar review results will be sent to this email.
包含至少一個大寫英文字母: Include at least one uppercase letter
包含至少一個特殊符號: Include at least one special character
感興趣的主題與偏好 (至少勾選一項): Topics and preferences of interest (select at least one)
我們將依此標籤為您進行動態與合適的帳號推薦配對。: These tags help us recommend posts and suitable accounts.
大頭照檔案大小超過 10 Mb 限制！: Avatar file size exceeds the 10 MB limit.
大頭照解析優化失敗，請換一張試試！: Avatar processing failed. Try another image.
請填寫有效的通知信箱，未來審核與平台通知會寄送到此信箱。: Enter a valid notification email. Future reviews and platform notices will be sent there.
密碼未滿足強度條件設定！: Password does not meet the strength requirements.
請上傳個人真實頭像供審核查驗。: Upload a real personal avatar for review.
請至少勾選一項主題偏好！: Select at least one topic preference.
伺服器連線超時，暫時無法提交。: Server connection timed out. Submission is temporarily unavailable.
該帳號已存在！請更換其他設定帳號。: This account already exists. Please choose another account.
申請資料提交成功！請靜待審核查驗。: Application submitted successfully. Please wait for review.
SecretRoom 為保障所有帳號的絕對隱私防護，一律採高規格人工手動審核。請: To protect all accounts and privacy, SecretRoom uses high-standard manual review. Refresh later to check your status.
很遺憾，您的加入申請未能通過管理審查團隊的查核。: Unfortunately, your application did not pass the admin review.
未遵守安全上傳規範（例如頭像模糊、非本人等）。: The safe upload requirements were not followed, such as a blurry or non-self avatar.
為開啟高級警報防護與即時密語傳輸，請在下方透過 Telegram 官方進行安全登: To enable advanced alerts and secure message transmission, bind your account through official Telegram login below.
請點擊下方按鈕以安全登入並關聯您的 Telegram 帳號：: Click the button below to securely log in and link your Telegram account:
Telegram 授權驗證失敗，請重試！: Telegram authorization failed. Please try again.
Telegram 官方授權與防護網已安全啟用 ✓: Telegram authorization and protection are now enabled ✓
此 Telegram 帳號已被使用者: This Telegram account is already bound by user
已安全退出 SecretRoom 俱樂部。: You have safely exited the SecretRoom club.
新的個人大頭照已送交管理員審核，通過後會自動套用。: Your new avatar has been sent for admin review and will be applied automatically after approval.
您的新頭像已完成審核並正式啟用。: Your new avatar has passed review and is now active.
本次大頭照更換未通過審核，您可以重新提交清晰且符合規範的照片。: This avatar change did not pass review. You may resubmit a clear compliant photo.
您的黃金 Spec 認證照片已送出，管理員將依據規格證明進行人工核查。: Your Gold Spec verification photo has been submitted. Admins will manually verify it against the measurement proof.
您已取得黃金 Spec 認證，S+ . S . G 功能已自動開啟。: You have received Gold Spec verification. S+ . S . G features are now enabled.
本次黃金 Spec 認證未通過，請確認照片清晰度與尺規參考後再重新申請。: This Gold Spec verification did not pass. Check photo clarity and ruler reference before reapplying.
請查看最新平台狀態。: Please check the latest platform status.
集中查看檢舉進度、黃金 Spec 認證、大頭照更換，以及官方平台通知。訊息時間以: View report progress, Gold Spec verification, avatar changes, and official platform notices in one place. Message times are fixed by send time or review completion time.
目前大廳尚無此偏好的祕密動態: There are no secret posts for this preference yet.
點擊分享動態，成為第一個探索本主題的創始同好吧！: Share a post and become the first member to explore this topic.
搜尋帳號、暱稱、Email、檢舉原因、貼文內容: Search account, nickname, email, report reason, or post content
每週一開始，週日結算。位階分數 = 按讚數 × 0.3 + 評星人數 × 平均星: The week starts on Monday and settles on Sunday. Rank score = likes × 0.3 + raters × average stars × 0.7 + posts × 10. You can move up or down at most one tier per week. Promotion requires at least one post this week.
發布貼文並累積按讚、評星後會自動進入週榜。: Post content and collect likes and ratings to enter the weekly board.
若並非您本人操作，請立即聯繫 SecretRoom 管理員。: If this was not done by you, contact a SecretRoom administrator immediately.
